infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Village uses your camera so you can add photos to your profile, meetups, and listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Village lets you choose photos to share on your profile, meetups, and listings.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Village uses your location to show parents and meetups in your neighborhood. Your exact location is never shared.
